name: Pipi Kaula (Hawaiian Style Jerky)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into strips about 1 3/4 inch wide.
2. Combine all other ingredients and soak beef in the sauce overnight.
3. If using a drying box, place meat in direct sunlight for two days, bringing it in at night.
4. If using an oven, set to 175 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Place meat on a rack (such as a cake baking rack) on a cookie sheet.
6. Dry meat in the oven for 7 hours.
7. Keep refrigerated.
